column1: Muslim Illuminationist and Sufi traditions, focusing on light metaphysics and mystical ascent, with columns for date, region, key figure, key texts, stages of the path, ascent narratives, and key terms. Only numeric years are used in the date column.

column6: Gradual ascent through knowledge and love

column4: Hikmat al-Ishrāq (Philosophy of Illumination), Hayakal al-Nur
column6: Ascent through realms of light (alam al-anwar), visionary encounters
column7: Ishrāq (Illumination), Nūr al-Anwar (Light of Lights), Alam al-Mithal (Imaginal Realm)

column3: Abu al-Najib Suhrawardi, Shihab al-Din Suhrawardi (Sufi)

column6: Mi'raj al-Ruh (spiritual ascent of the soul), visions of Divine Light
column7: Wahdat al-Wujud (Unity of Being), Barzakh (Isthmus), Nūr Muhammadi
